info.title: Salesforce Hosted MCP
info.description: Passthrough connector to Salesforce's hosted MCP servers. Connect Copilot Studio agents to any standard or custom Salesforce Hosted MCP Server — SObject All, SObject Reads, SObject Mutations, SObject Deletes, Data 360, Tableau Next, or custom servers built from Apex Actions and Flows. Change the basePath to target a different server. Requires a Salesforce External Client App with the mcp_api OAuth scope.

post.description: Proxies MCP requests to a Salesforce Hosted MCP Server. Tools are defined and executed by Salesforce — the connector is a passthrough. Change the basePath to target a different server: sobject-all, sobject-reads, sobject-mutations, sobject-deletes, data-cloud-queries, tableau-next, or a custom server API name.
